arts.ttl: Preview: Rotherham United vs. Blackpool - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League One clash between Rotherham United and Blackpool, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Rotherham eased any potential growing relegation fears by winning at struggling Northampton to put a nine-point gap between themselves and the bottom four. The Millers have only won consecutive games...
